subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God in the Tree of Paradise, upon the shore of eternity, amidst the branches of the celestial cloud, at the right hand of the Spirit in the valley [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره الفردوس فی شاطی البقا علی افنان العما یمین الروح فی وادی
subcodes.subjects: @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
